examples.title: Content section

whenToUse: Wrapping a page region with block padding and a centered inner width
The default container for stacking content within a page
whenNotToUse: Just centering a single element — use Center
A marketing band with built-in CTA content — use Cta or Hero

intent.a11yRationale: Renders a section element to group related content for screen readers.
